calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Ccp 1290
Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MICHAEL THOMAS of Simpson, Garrity, Innes & Jacuzzi, PC, Tel No. (925) 322-8889 appearing for the Petitioner Life Connection;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER LIFE CONNECTION'S Petition To Compel Arbitration Under CCP 1290 is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)
